name: Mqtt → On Message
description: An action to be performed when a message on a specific MQTT topic is received. See [`on_message` Trigger](https://esphome.io/components/mqtt#mqtt-on_message).

config_entries.label: Topic
config_entries.description: The MQTT topic to subscribe to and listen for MQTT messages on. Every time a message with **this exact topic** is received, the automation will trigger.

config_entries.label: Payload
config_entries.description: Optionally set a payload to match. Only if exactly the payload you specify with this option is received, the automation will be executed.

config_entries.label: QOS
config_entries.description: The MQTT Quality of Service to subscribe to the topic with. Defaults to 0.
